# Real-Time Resolution Helped Credit Repair Company Stop 73% of Initiated Disputes

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

In the first 30 days, a leading credit repair company reduced its total Visa dispute volume with Sift. Read this one-pager to learn how:

*   Real-time Resolution allows merchants to create stronger dispute management cases and scale operations
*   Automated chargeback processing improves efficiency and prevents significant revenue loss to rising disputes
